svg.title: Biza chapter reading flow — what happens inside one chapter
svg.desc: Sequential flow showing header, content blocks, quiz placement, and completion screen

g.text: Title · lesson name · progress bar (thin teal strip at top) · close X
Bold punchy statement — sets the mental frame. 1 sentence. eg. "Most people fail here."
1–3 sentences each · conversational tone · never more than 4 lines on mobile
Build on the visual. Reinforce with real Kenyan context where possible.
Quiz — embedded mid-chapter (not at the end)
MCQ · scenario · true/false · or fill-in — 1 question per concept
Wrong = shows Explanation · does NOT block progress · Correct = green confirm + continue
Highlighted box — the one thing to remember. Bold. Short. Max 2 lines.
Brief bridge to next chapter. Builds anticipation. "In the next chapter, you'll see exactly how..."
✓ checkmark · motivational message (no points) · "Next chapter →" button
eg. "Done. That's one more thing most people never bother to learn." — Keep going.

svg.text: Quiz types used creatively across chapters:
← Back · Progress bar shows position within lesson · all navigation fixed at bottom on mobile →
